post.description: Create the first admin account using a one-time bootstrap secret.

Check if an email address is already registered.

Accepts { "email": "..." } in the request body.
Returns available (bool) and isExisting (bool).

Register a new user account.

Args:
    request (RegisterRequest): Registration data from the client.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Success response with user data.

Verify a user's email with a token.

Args:
    request (VerifyEmailRequest): Token data from the email link.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Success message confirming verification.

Resend a verification email to the user.

Args:
    request (ResendVerificationRequest): Email to resend to.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Success message confirming email was resent.

Login with email and password to receive JWT tokens.

Args:
    request (LoginRequest): Login credentials from the client.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Access token, refresh token, and user info.

Authenticate or auto-register a user via Google OAuth2.

Args:
    request (GoogleLoginRequest): Google ID token from the client SDK.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Access token, refresh token, is_new_user flag, and user info.

Authenticate or auto-register a user via Facebook OAuth2.

Args:
    request (FacebookLoginRequest): Facebook access token from the client SDK.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Access token, refresh token, is_new_user flag, and user info.

Issue a new access and refresh token using a valid refresh token.

Args:
    request (RefreshTokenRequest): The current refresh token.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: New access token, refresh token, token type, and expiry.

Logout the current user and invalidate their session.

Args:
    request (LogoutRequest): The refresh token to invalidate.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): The authenticated user from JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Success message confirming logout.

Request a password reset link for the given email.

Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email is registered
to prevent user enumeration.

Args:
    request (ForgotPasswordRequest): Email to send reset link to.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Generic success message.

Verify that a password reset token is valid and not yet used or expired.

Does not consume the token — the user can still call /reset-password
with the same token afterwards.

Args:
    request (VerifyResetTokenRequest): The reset token to check.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: valid=true if the token is usable, false otherwise with a reason.

Reset a user's password using a valid reset token.

Args:
    request (ResetPasswordRequest): Token and new password.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.

Returns:
    dict: Success message confirming password update.

get.description:
Get the full profile of the currently authenticated user.

Args:
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Full profile data.

patch.description:
Update profile fields for the authenticated user.

Args:
    data (UpdateProfileRequest): Fields to update.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Updated profile data.

get.description:
Get all external social profile links for the authenticated user.

Args:
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: List of social link objects.

put.description:
Replace all social links for the authenticated user.

Args:
    data (UpdateSocialLinksRequest): Full list of social links.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Updated list of social links.

patch.description:
Toggle profile visibility between public and private.

Args:
    data (UpdatePrivacyRequest): The privacy setting.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Updated privacy status.

put.description:
Upload a profile picture (avatar) for the authenticated user.

Args:
    file (UploadFile): The image file (multipart/form-data).
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Path to the uploaded avatar.

Upload a cover photo for the authenticated user.

Args:
    file (UploadFile): The image file (multipart/form-data).
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Path to the uploaded cover photo.

get.description:
Get all conversations for the authenticated user.

Returns each conversation with both participants'
user_id, display_name, and profile_picture.
Ordered newest conversation first.

Args:
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: List of conversations with participant details.

post.description:
Create a new 1-to-1 conversation or return an existing one.

If a conversation already exists between the authenticated user
and the given participant, the existing record is returned.

Args:
    data (CreateConversationRequest): Body with participant_id.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: conversation_id of the new or existing conversation.

get.description: Return the total number of unread messages across all conversations.

delete.description:
Delete a conversation and all its messages permanently.

Only a participant of the conversation can delete it.
All messages are removed via cascade delete.

Args:
    conversation_id (UUID): Conversation UUID from the URL path.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: Success confirmation message.

patch.description: Mark all unread messages in a conversation as read for the current user.

get.description:
Get all messages in a conversation, ordered oldest-first.

Only the two participants of the conversation can access this.

Args:
    conversation_id (UUID): Conversation UUID from the URL path.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: List of message objects including track/playlist fields.

post.description:
Send a message inside an existing conversation.

Supports plain text, track sharing, playlist sharing,
or any combination. Only participants can send messages.

Args:
    conversation_id (UUID): Conversation UUID from the URL path.
    data (SendMessageRequest): Body with content/track_id/playlist_id.
    db (Session): Database session injected by FastAPI.
    current_user (User): Injected by JWT dependency.

Returns:
    dict: The newly created message with all fields.

patch.description:
Mark a specific message as read.

Only the receiver of the message can call this endpoint.
Calling it on an already-read message is safe (idempotent).

post.description:
Follow a user. If the target account is private, a follow request is
created instead (202 Accepted, is_pending=true). Public accounts are
followed immediately (200 OK, is_pending=false).

get.description: Return all pending follow requests sent to the authenticated user.

post.description: Approve a pending follow request.

get.description:
Search users using a GIN trigram index on display_name.
Compare response time against GET /search/users?keyword=...

Search tracks using a GIN trigram index on title.
Compare response time against GET /search/tracks?keyword=...

Search playlists using a GIN trigram index on name.
Compare response time against GET /search/playlists?keyword=...

Get the current user's subscription status and upload usage.

Returns plan ("Free", "Premium", or "Pro"), billing cycle,
tracks uploaded, and upload limit.

Requires Bearer JWT authentication.

post.description:
Upgrade to Standard Premium with monthly billing ($9.99).
Request body: payment_token and plan="Premium".
Requires Bearer JWT authentication.

Upgrade to Standard Premium with yearly billing ($99.99).
Request body: payment_token and plan="Premium".
Requires Bearer JWT authentication.

Upgrade to Pro with monthly billing ($19.99).
Request body: payment_token and plan="Pro".
Requires Bearer JWT authentication.

Upgrade to Pro with yearly billing ($149.99).
Request body: payment_token and plan="Pro".
Requires Bearer JWT authentication.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response

get.description:
Discover feed with in-memory cache (60s TTL).
First call hits the DB. Every call within 60s after that is instant.
Compare against GET /feed/discover which hits the DB every time.

delete.description: Clear the feed cache — useful for resetting between demo runs.

get.description:
Get all public tracks reposted by a user, identified by username.
No authentication required.

Health check endpoint.

Returns:
    dict: Simple message confirming the API is running.

CreateConversationRequest.title: CreateConversationRequest
CreateConversationRequest.description:
Schema for creating or retrieving a 1-to-1 conversation.

Args:
    username (str): Username of the other user.

FacebookLoginRequest.title: FacebookLoginRequest
FacebookLoginRequest.description:
Schema for Facebook OAuth2 social login request.

Args:
    facebook_token (str): The Facebook access token returned by the
        client-side Facebook SDK.

ForgotPasswordRequest.title: ForgotPasswordRequest
ForgotPasswordRequest.description:
Schema for requesting a password reset link.

Args:
    email (EmailStr): Email address of the account.

GoogleLoginRequest.title: GoogleLoginRequest
GoogleLoginRequest.description:
Schema for Google OAuth2 social login request.

Args:
    google_token (str): The Google ID token returned by the
        client-side Google Sign-In SDK.

LogoutRequest.title: LogoutRequest
LogoutRequest.description:
Schema for logout request.

Args:
    refresh_token (str): The refresh token to invalidate server-side.

RefreshTokenRequest.title: RefreshTokenRequest
RefreshTokenRequest.description:
Schema for refresh token request.

Args:
    refresh_token (str): The current valid refresh token.

example.message: Registration successful. Please verify your email.

ResendVerificationRequest.title: ResendVerificationRequest
ResendVerificationRequest.description:
Schema for resending the verification email.

Args:
    email (EmailStr): The registered email address to resend to.

ResetPasswordRequest.title: ResetPasswordRequest
ResetPasswordRequest.description:
Schema for resetting a password with a reset token.

Args:
    token (str): Password reset token from the email link.
    new_password (str): New password. Min 8 chars, 1 uppercase,
        1 number.

SendMessageRequest.title: SendMessageRequest
SendMessageRequest.description:
Schema for sending a message inside a conversation.

At least one of content, track_id, or playlist_id must be provided.
content is capped at 2000 characters.

Args:
    content (str, optional): The message text.
    track_id (UUID, optional): UUID of a track to share.
    playlist_id (UUID, optional): UUID of a playlist to share.

SocialLinkItem-Input.title: SocialLinkItem
SocialLinkItem-Input.description:
Schema for a single social link entry.

Args:
    platform (str): Platform name (instagram, twitter, etc.).
    url (str): Full URL starting with https://.

UpdatePrivacyRequest.title: UpdatePrivacyRequest
UpdatePrivacyRequest.description:
Schema for toggling profile visibility.

Args:
    is_private (bool): True for private, False for public.

UpdateSocialLinksRequest.title: UpdateSocialLinksRequest
UpdateSocialLinksRequest.description:
Schema for replacing all social links.

Args:
    social_links (List[SocialLinkItem]): Complete list of links.
        Max 5 links. Send empty list to clear all links.

UpgradeRequest.title: UpgradeRequest
UpgradeRequest.description: Request body for upgrading to Premium (monthly or yearly endpoint).

VerifyEmailRequest.title: VerifyEmailRequest
VerifyEmailRequest.description:
Schema for email verification request.

Args:
    token (str): Verification token from the email link.

VerifyResetTokenRequest.title: VerifyResetTokenRequest
VerifyResetTokenRequest.description:
Schema for verifying a password reset token without consuming it.

Args:
    token (str): Password reset token from the email.
